user.title: Connect to cTrader
user.description:
Complete the OAuth 2.0 authentication flow first:

1. Register app at https://openapi.ctrader.com
2. Get Spotware approval
3. Follow auth flow: https://help.ctrader.com/open-api/account-authentication/#authentication-flow
4. Exchange authorization code for tokens
5. Find your Account ID in cTrader platform

Paste the values you received from the OAuth flow:
- Access Token (from token response)
- Refresh Token (from token response)
- Client ID (from app credentials)
- Client Secret (from app credentials)
- Account ID (your cTID account number)

The integration will automatically refresh your access token when needed.

error.invalid_auth:
Invalid credentials. Check:
- All tokens and credentials are correct
- Access token is valid (from OAuth flow)
- Refresh token is valid
- Account ID matches authorized account

abort.already_configured: This cTrader account is already configured
